arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Forest TV channel, live stream and how to watch
arts.sum: Arsenal were held to a draw with Chelsea in their previous match before the international break and are without a win across their last four Premier League fixtures. Despite Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest not being available to watch in the UK, the match is still being broadcast abroad.

arts.ttl: Five players will miss Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest as Mikel Arteta issues major injury update
arts.sum: "We know that Ben is going to push every boundary but it got to a point where we have to protect the player and we decided to do the surgery. " Ben is gonna be out for months, unfortunately," said the Arsenal boss.

arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has explained the situation with Ben White, Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice ahead of his side's Premier League game against Nottingham Forest

arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly identify RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba as a possible successor to William Saliba if the latter is lured to Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta returns from visit to owners to ignite Arsenal’s title challenge
arts.sum: ‘Only one way to fulfil expectation – win big trophies’ Saka and Rice back for Forest visit but Ben White out Mikel Arteta returned from a visit to see Arsenal’s owners over the international break determined to turn up the temperature and ignite his side’s stuttering title challenge. The head coach was in an animated mood as he warmed up for a crucial run of fixtures, with the emphasis on playing with fire in the belly in Saturday afternoon’s home game against Nottingham Forest. arts.ttl: Newcastle ready to swoop for winger courted by Liverpool and Arsenal
arts.sum: Newcastle United are considering a January bid for exciting Belgian winger Johan Bakayoko, according to reports. The Magpies have been on the lookout for reinforcements in wide positions for some time now, especially with Miguel Almiron likely to leave the club soon.
